cards.name: Ancient Blight
cards.description: Apply 2 Bleed to all enemies and gain 5 Block.

cards.name: Spectral Slash
cards.description: Deal 12 damage. If any enemy is Bleeding, deal +4 damage.

cards.name: Gothic Ritual
cards.description: Draw 2 cards. If you have no cards in hand, draw 2 additional cards.

cards.name: Crippling Shroud
cards.description: Apply 1 Weak and 1 Vulnerable to a random enemy.

cards.name: Wailing Abyss
cards.description: All enemies lose 5 HP and gain 2 Doom.

cards.name: Ashen Shield
cards.description: Gain 12 Block. If you have any Block, gain +4 Block.

cards.name: Cursed Bomb
cards.description: Deal 20 damage to a random enemy. If that enemy dies, deal 10 damage to all enemies.

cards.name: Haunted Curse
cards.description: Apply 2 Poison to all enemies. If any enemy dies this turn, draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Shroud of Night
cards.description: Gain Intangible for 1 turn. If you already have Intangible, gain 2 Artifact.
